minting_now.name: BlockHistory: Tweets
minting_now.description:
BlockHistory: Tweets is a curated NFT collection preserving the most influential tweets ever posted—moments that didn’t just trend, but changed the world.




Each piece captures a single tweet that sparked real-world impact across markets, politics, technology, and culture. From viral breakthroughs

minting_now.name: Ethemines Universe
minting_now.description: A First Mining P2e Game On Base

minting_now.name: Hungarian Hush
minting_now.description:
On the shores of Lake Balaton, cold wind meets warm light.
As if the day had decided not to wake up completely.

minting_now.name: NFT FAM by Ilya Kazakov
minting_now.description:
This is more than a digital archive; it is a map of my journey through the on-chain world. Within this 10x10 grid lie the projects, the legends, and the creators I am proud to call my FAM.

These are the 100 collections that ignited my passion, the legends who kept me awake at night, and the communi

minting_now.name: QYLO BOT CARDS
minting_now.description: QYLO BOT CARDS : A P2E Gaming Cards Collection On @BASE

minting_now.name: Art Blocks Explorations
minting_now.description:
Since founding Art Blocks in 2020, artist Erick Calderon (a.k.a.
Snowfro) has been intrigued by the idea of representing digital artwork
in the physical world in the form of an ephemeral physical object with
meaning, but with no inherent value. Donald Judd has long been an
inspiration for Art Blocks

minting_now.name: Boardwalk Club
minting_now.description: Boardwalk Club collection has 800 limited edition NFTs. Beach Club has 720 while the rarer Founders Club has 80. Boardwalk Club collection is designed as a digital tool for active participants in the Boardwalk ecosystem.

minting_now.name: Mutants On Base
minting_now.description: Mutants On Base | MAPE is an exclusive NFT collection featuring 3,333 uniquely designed digital apes, hosted on the Ape blockchain. Created by NightRare Labs, the team behind the successful collection BABC and BBKC,AOB. Mutants aims to bring fresh energy to the NFT space with its distinctive style a

minting_now.name: Doge Much WoW
minting_now.description:
Much Wow. So NFT. Very 10K. 🐕‍🦺
A digital collection for the degens, the dreamers, and the dog lovers.

minting_now.name: BOY:SCAR
minting_now.description:
BOY:SCAR is a collection of cool, scar-marked boys—each one carrying a unique identity shaped by mystery, experience, and hidden power.
Every scar tells a different story. Some were earned, some were given, and some… are still awakening.

minting_now.name: Apes Bunitori Club
minting_now.description:
Welcome to the Apes Bunitori Club! 🐒
Apes Bunitori Club is a unique NFT collection bringing together an exclusive community of collectors and digital art enthusiasts. Each ape is one of a kind, featuring distinctive traits that combine creativity and bold design.

🌟 Why choose this collection?

minting_now.name: Normie Punk
minting_now.description: Normie Punk is made for fun only

minting_now.name: CiDrAliTO
minting_now.description:
🪐 CiDrAliTO is a multichain ecosystem for animal protection!
🔗 CiDrAliTO | BASE:
https://drive.google.com/file/d/17WdkbIdNFeB7PceNfT5ueyPwtRscYbJs/view

minting_now.name: Collectr
minting_now.description:
Monthly Art on Base - Discover our stunning editions published monthly to bring awareness to the global community. With crosschain accessibility and credit card support, we make it easy for anyone to begin their own global art collecting journey.

Created with love by [Kusari](https://kusari.org).

minting_now.name: Rainsect by Ridoxin
minting_now.description: A unique collection capturing the harmony of insects and rain in nature.

Apes, We’ve hit the 1M follower milestone!Join our Twitter Space tomorrow at 9pm ET to celebrate all that has been BAYC over the past year and a half with our co-hosts . Come hang in this celebratory community chat.

Last person to say ‘Pengu Morning’ wins. Pengu morning Pudgy Penguins, roll call in the comments! This card is the only reason I am using a physical card. Just used the card for the manicure session This can’t get any better. to take over the world.
Which penguin is your favorite?
